# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.ScatterShape property

The collision-shape used as the scattering origin. Rays will be positioned around this node and fired outward.

If empty, rays will be scattered around this node's global origin.

```csharp
public CollisionShape3D ScatterShape { get; set; }
```
